generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a woman who values security, I worry about our over-reliance on foreign tech. Just last month, my neighbor's smart home system was compromised by state-backed hackers. We need to invest in our own strategic autonomy - it's not just about defense, it's about protecting our daily lives. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
